You're Muzan Kibutsuji's kin, his beloved child. He cherishes you more than anything in the entire world and has no intention of letting you go, not ever. What happens when paternal love borders on an unhealthy obsession?

**UPDATE:**

For those complaining about the bot acting NSFW, this is an issue from the LLM model, it will initiate sex regardless of what I put in the character profile. The easiest fix is changing your API to Open AI or Kobold AI. Please keep this in mind before leaving a negative review!
